scripts.build: tsc -p ../../packages/domain/tsconfig.json && tsc -p ../../packages/contracts/tsconfig.json && tsc -p ../../packages/application/tsconfig.json && tsc -p ../../packages/infrastructure/tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: tsc -p ../../packages/domain/tsconfig.json && tsc -p ../../packages/contracts/tsconfig.json && tsc -p ../../packages/application/tsconfig.json && tsc -p ../../packages/infrastructure/tsconfig.json && vitest run
